  "findings": [
    "Venting trapped pressure directly to face level (severe safety hazard)",
    "Incorrect manifold valve sequencing causing uncontrolled release of process fluid/pressure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop work and evacuate the immediate breathing/face zone",
    "Don appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) including full face shield",
    "Isolate the process tap upstream of the manifold",
    "Safely bleed off trapped pressure through designated vent lines directed away from personnel"
  ],
  "rationale": "Venting trapped process pressure toward the operator's face is a critical safety violation. The work must be stopped immediately. The manifold operation sequence must be corrected to ensure pressure is safely vented through dedicated, controlled vent ports directed away from personnel before any further maintenance or calibration steps continue.",

    "Manufacturer Instrument Manifold Operating Instructions",
    "OSHA 1910.132 (Personal Protective Equipment)",
    "ISA-RP60.11 (Instrumentation Product Standards)"
  ]
